name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Mix together the shortening, 1 1/2 cups sugar, and eggs thoroughly.
3. Blend in the flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt until combined.
4. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in the sugar-cinnamon mixture.
7. Place the dough balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. These cookies will puff up initially and then flatten out as they cool.
Makes: 6 dozen
